title: PsiEX
description:
This is an add-on for Psi. I made it because my brain was burned (or captivated) by TiCEX.
Psiのアドオンです。TiCEXに脳を焼かれて作りました。
body:
このModは、Vazkii氏によるPsiModをベースに、moffy氏のTiCEXを見て思った、「多様な要素を組み合わせる」というコンセプトに脳を焼かれた結果生み出されたAddonです。
　色々なModとの連携要素があります。Psiの魔法を発射できるIron's Spellbook、CADのTinkers' Construct化、Psiの機能を拡張するものもあります。
 This add-on is based on PsiMod by Vazkii and was created because I was so captivated (or obsessed) by the concept of "combining various elements" that I saw in TiCEX by moffy.

It includes integration elements with a variety of other mods. These include:

Iron's Spellbook compatibility, allowing it to cast Psi spells.

Tinkers' Construct integration for the CAD (e.g., turning the CAD into a Tinkers' Construct item).

Various features that expand the functionality of Psi.
